title: Add PNG export for rendered diagrams
description: Added PNG export to the public render result API, custom element controls, local playground, static demo, and 3D canvas renderer.
decision_notes: 2D exports render the current SVG result to a PNG canvas with a white background and configurable scale.
3D exports use the mounted WebGL canvas via preserveDrawingBuffer so the current camera view can be captured.
The toolbar export button is available in the custom element controls, localhost playground, and static demo.
verification: Vite dev server restarted on http://127.0.0.1:4174/ (PID 90153)
handoff: Browser plugin tab discovery returned no in-app tab in this session, so click-to-download was not exercised through the browser automation surface.
If revisiting export, add a browser smoke test that stubs anchor downloads and verifies 2D SVG-to-PNG and 3D canvas-to-PNG produce non-empty blobs.
